title: Dataanalytiker (barselsvikariat/projektansættelse)
description: Data analyst role in Digitalisering & Kliniknær Analyse at Rigshospitalet. Develop data tools, dashboards, and models. Data extraction and advanced analysis. Support clinical departments with data-driven decision support. Communicate complex analyses clearly. R, Python, SQL, Power BI required.
match_reasons: Strong R, Python, SQL skills|Power BI experience from IQVIA consulting|Experience communicating complex data to non-technical audiences|Advanced statistical methods background
gaps: No hospital sector or Sundhedsplatformen experience|No process mining experience|Temporary position (until April 2027)|Limited Danish language skills
